---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://github.com" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Lumbar Spinal Stenosis Claims Analysis</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>Encounter-level healthcare utilization and payments in operative and nonoperative management of lumbar spinal stenosis. Publication under review, 2026.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>
<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://github.com" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Personal Website</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>This website — built with R Markdown and GitHub Pages.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>
</div>
